title: antirrhinum hispanicum subsp. hispanicum
intro: Antirrhinum hispanicum subsp. hispanicum, also known as the Spanish snapdragon, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the snapdragon family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant's medicinal properties include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides and flavonoids. The health benefits of Antirrhinum hispanicum subsp. hispanicum include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
